name: Typical Settlements for Work Slips in South Salt Lake

mainEntity.name: What is average settlement for slip and fall workers comp in South Salt Lake?
mainEntity.text: What is average settlement for slip and fall workers comp in South Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: South Salt Lake slip comp settlements average $20K-$50K depending on injury severity lost wages and disability rating no public database.[7]

suggestedAnswer.text: Varies by medical costs permanency. Back neck common higher. Insurers lowball initially. Attorney negotiates better using comp calculators. Taxes apply to lump sums. Free evals estimate your case.[7]
